title: SF Integrated Modpack
description: A practical and high-performance modpack that significantly enhances the gaming experience, supporting most features while preserving the original game mechanics.
body:

# About the ‚ÄåSF Integrated Modpack
‚ÄåSF Integrated Modpack‚Äå is a foundational ‚Äåmodpack‚Äå centered around ‚Äåassistive optimization‚Äå, enhancing vanilla gameplay with various practical features while ‚Äåstriving for better performance‚Äå.\
‚ÄåThis modpack‚Äå is licensed under the ‚ÄåMIT License‚Äå. You may ‚Äåmodify‚Äå it or ‚Äåcreate derivative works‚Äå based on this modpack, but ‚Äåyou must retain both the original author's copyright notice and the license text‚Äå.
# introduce
‚ÄåThe modpack‚Äå is divided into two main versions: ‚Äå[Neo]Forge‚Äå and ‚ÄåFabric‚Äå.\
The ‚Äå[Neo]Forge version‚Äå is ‚Äåcatered towards‚Äå gameplay with mods or ‚Äåserving as a foundation for creating derivative modpacks‚Äå.The ‚ÄåFabric version‚Äå is ‚Äåmore focused on vanilla survival gameplay‚Äå.
![Â±ïÁ§∫](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31e50543c3bd0d1fcd9bd6c22b20b80edf002aca_0.webp)
‚ÄåThe SF Integrated Modpack‚Äå incorporates numerous ‚Äåsurvival-assisting mods‚Äå, while ‚Äåmaintaining unchanged core game mechanics‚Äå, thereby introducing ‚Äåextensive utility functions‚Äå.Whether for ‚Äåvanilla survival‚Äå, ‚Äåmodded gameplay‚Äå, or ‚Äådeveloping derivative modpacks‚Äå, the ‚ÄåSF Integrated Modpack‚Äå can assist you.
# ‚ÄåPerformance Aspects
The modpack‚Äå incorporates optimization mods including ‚ÄåSodium and its forks‚Äå, ‚ÄåLithium and its forks‚Äå, ‚ÄåEntity Culling‚Äå, and ‚ÄåScalableLux‚Äå, ‚Äåenhancing game performance while reducing stutter and increasing frame rates.\
‚Äå
Concurrently, ‚ÄåXaeroPlus is installed to enable the minimap's frame rate limiter feature‚Äå, ‚Äåmitigating the minimap's impact on game frames.\
‚Äå
Compared to other foundational modpacks, ‚Äåthe SF Integrated Modpack delivers superior performance‚Äå in benchmark tests: ‚Äå[Forest Biome Render Distance: 12, Simulation Distance: 8, Seed: -5764802906405568434].
| SF Integrated Fabric|SF Integrated NeoForge|XPlus 2.0|Arcomua|
|:-------------------:|:--------------------:|:-------:|:-----:|
|1200-1300FPS|1300-1400FPS|1000-1100FPS      | 1000-1100FPS        |
# ‚ÄåAssist and Repair
‚ÄåThe modpack‚Äå integrates key functional mods:\
‚ÄåXaero's Minimap‚Äå for map;\
‚ÄåJEI/REI‚Äå for recipe viewing;\
‚ÄåJade‚Äå for block information display;\
‚ÄåQuick screenshot viewer and management‚Äå within menus;\
‚ÄåCross-version server compatibility‚Äå;\
‚ÄåPeek‚Äå for instant item data lookup;\
BetterF3‚Äå/riding HUDs/advancement/statistics interfaces‚Äå, and similar utilities to streamline gameplay.\
Concurrently, it incorporates fixes and optimizations:\
‚ÄåDebugify‚Äå resolves unresolved vanilla bugs.\
‚ÄåModel Gap Fix‚Äå eliminates white edges on tool textures.\
‚ÄåDynamic Lighting‚Äå for adaptive illumination;\
‚ÄåUniversal Skin Fix‚Äå for texture compatibility.\
For technical players, essential mods include:\
‚ÄåTweakeroo‚Äå, ‚ÄåminiHUD‚Äå, ‚ÄåLitematica‚Äå (schematic projection), and other core redstone/automation utilities.
# ‚ÄåFunctionality and Visual Enhancements
‚ÄåThe modpack‚Äå integrates mods that restore most features of OptiFine‚Äîincluding connected textures, skybox rendering, entity model textures, and shader loading‚Äîthrough implementations such as ‚ÄåCIT Resewn‚Äå, ‚ÄåContinuity‚Äå, ‚ÄåEntity Texture Features (ETF)‚Äå, and ‚ÄåEntity Model Features (EMF)‚Äå.\
Visual enhancements include:Dynamic crosshairs‚Äå for aiming aesthetics;‚ÄåSeamless glass textures‚Äå via connected resource packs;‚ÄåPartial shader support‚Äå bundled by default.
‚ÄåAdditionally, the modpack incorporates extensive supplementary functionality.
# (Neo)Forge
1. ‚ÄåJEI Addons Integration‚Äå:/
Enables quick lookup of ‚Äåcreature breeding items‚Äå, ‚Äåore generation heights‚Äå, and ‚Äåentity loot tables‚Äå for efficient mod item discovery./
Implements ‚ÄåPolymorph‚Äå to resolve recipe conflicts across multiple mods./
2. ‚ÄåAttribute System Enhancements‚Äå:/
Integrates ‚ÄåAttributeFix‚Äå to extend vanilla numerical limits./
Adds ‚Äåvisually refined health/armor limit-breaking displays‚Äå as groundwork for attribute-heavy mods./
Includes ‚ÄåEnchantment Descriptions‚Äå for clear modded enchantment effects./
3. ‚ÄåExploration Utilities‚Äå:/
Adds ‚ÄåExplorer‚Äôs Compass‚Äå and ‚ÄåBiome Compass‚Äå to facilitate locating specific structures or biomes in modded environments./
# ‚ÄåImportant Notes‚Äå
1.Mods like ‚ÄåTweakeroo‚Äå and ‚ÄåLitematica‚Äå ship without preconfigured shortcuts. Users need manually bind keys to their preferred inputs./
2.‚Äå‚ÄåThe Fabric edition‚Äå of the modpack will continuously synchronize with the latest Minecraft versions while providing ‚Äåbackported versions‚Äå for earlier releases. The ‚Äå[Neo]Forge edition‚Äå receives updates exclusively for ‚Äåmajor mod revisions‚Äå./
3.‚ÄåThis modpack's optimization system‚Äå builds upon ‚Äårapid optimization modpacks‚Äå. During development, reference was made to ‚Äåmods and configurations‚Äå from modpacks including:XPlus,‚ÄåArcomua,‚Äå‚ÄåFabulously Optimized\‚Äå
The modpack Developed solely by one author, with gratitude to all participants in this modpack's testing.
# Q&A
‚ÄåQ: Why is [XX feature] missing in some versions? \
‚Äå
‚ÄåA:‚Äå Due to version compatibility, loader support limitations, and the author's scope of expertise, certain features may be absent in specific versions. Please refer to each version's mod list for definitive details.

‚ÄåQ: Can I create new modpacks based on this one? \
‚Äå
‚ÄåA:‚Äå Absolutely! This modpack uses the ‚ÄåMIT License‚Äå. You may modify it or create derivative works, but you must preserve the original author's copyright and license notices.

‚ÄåQ: More questions? Or suggestions about the modpack? \
